title: Scorpion scorpion_exo_gt930_track-grey

specs.material: Carbon Fiber Composite Shell with EPS Liner

technical_analysis: The scorpion_exo_gt930_track-grey utilizes a proprietary carbon fiber weave architecture that significantly reduces mass without compromising structural integrity. The internal EPS liner is engineered with variable-density zones to optimize energy absorption during high-impact scenarios, adhering strictly to the latest ECE 22.06 safety standards. Its aerodynamic shell design features integrated air channels that minimize drag while directing airflow to critical cooling zones, ensuring thermal regulation at sustained highway speeds.
marketing_description: Experience the pinnacle of lightweight protection with the Scorpion EXO GT930 Track Grey. Designed for the modern rider who demands performance without compromise, this helmet combines a sleek, aggressive aesthetic with advanced carbon fiber technology. The track-grey finish offers a sophisticated look that stands out on the road, while the internal comfort system ensures all-day riding bliss.
yoast_metadesc: Discover the Scorpion EXO GT930 Track Grey: a lightweight carbon fiber full-face helmet featuring ECE 22.06 certification, magnetic buckle strap, and superior aerodynamics for ultimate safety and style.
